meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to build high-converting user onboarding to overcome the 'no portfolio' hurdle. A beginner tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is solved by demonstrating product thinking rather than just code. By building a high-fidelity user onboarding flow, you prove you understand user psychology, friction reduction, and business metrics. This is the single most effective way to signal seniority to hiring managers and potential clients.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank screen, the crushing weight of 'no experience' looming over your career prospects. Every job posting demands a portfolio, but every portfolio requires a job. It is the classic paradox that stalls thousands of talented developers before they even begin their journey.

But here is the secret: employers don't want to see a laundry list of generic CRUD apps. They want to see someone who can solve business problems. By mastering user onboarding, you transform from a coder who writes syntax into an engineer who crafts experiences. This project is your bridge from student to professional.

steps.title: Define the User Journey Map
steps.description: Before writing code, map out the friction points where a user might quit. We focus on the 'Time to Value' metric.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a user onboarding journey map for a SaaS task manager. Identify 3 friction points and propose a solution for each that reduces time-to-value to under 60 seconds.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /ask 'Generate a JSON schema for a 3-step user onboarding flow including state management for completion status.'

steps.title: Bootstrap the Onboarding UI
steps.description: Use modern UI patterns to create a clean, non-intrusive interface that guides the user without overwhelming them.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React-based onboarding modal component using Tailwind CSS. Include progress bars, clear call-to-actions, and a 'skip' option.

steps.title: Implement State-Driven Logic
steps.description: Ensure the app remembers where the user left off, preventing them from seeing the onboarding sequence twice.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a custom React hook called useOnboarding that persists user progress in localStorage and returns the current step.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /edit 'Create a new file src/hooks/useOnboarding.js with logic to track and persist user steps.'

steps.title: Integrate Micro-Interactions
steps.description: Add subtle animations that make the application feel premium and responsive.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add Framer Motion animations to the onboarding modal transitions to make the experience feel fluid and professional.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /terminal 'npm install framer-motion' && claude /edit 'Apply slide-in animations to the modal component.'

steps.title: Final Deployment and Portfolio Polish
steps.description: Deploy your project and add a 'Case Study' README that explains the 'why' behind your design choices.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a README.md file for a portfolio project that highlights the user onboarding flow, the metrics improved, and the technical challenges solved.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /ask 'Review my repository and generate a professional README summary that emphasizes business impact for recruiters.'

pro_tips: Always measure 'Drop-off Rate' at each step of your onboarding; recruiters love candidates who think in metrics.
Use 'Progressive Disclosure'—only ask for user data when it is absolutely necessary for the next step.
Design for the 'Empty State'—the moment a user signs up but has no data, your UI should be inviting, not hollow.
Include a 'Skip' button. Forcing users through onboarding is a dark pattern that lowers trust.
Add a 'Learn More' tooltip for complex features; it shows you prioritize user education over feature bloat.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, record a 60-second Loom video walking through the code and the user journey. Embed this video in your portfolio site to show communication skills alongside your technical ability.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a student; you are a product-focused engineer with a portfolio piece that solves a real business problem. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
